text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Your timing was off there... You made your move far too early.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's gotten you all flustered?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you listening?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: I... I'm done with this.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I only came to Tracen Academy because I
happened to be good at running and races were
kinda fun.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
But my mom has zero racing experience. There's
absolutely nothing of note about my family.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What is your point?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying I'm a nobody! No family name to
uphold, no dreams to achieve! I don't have any
reason to run!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm not like you or anyone else here! There's... no
place for me at this academy!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Is that all?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Very well. We're done for today. Rest up and stay
warm.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. I have two requests to make of you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
First, I'd like your permission to wear my
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Second, I'd like to reserve your next day off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my next day off, I head to the track like Air
Groove requested.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
Your signature racewear looks amazing, but why
are you showing it to me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I inherited this blue and yellow design from my
mother, the Queen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
From there, I altered the design to reflect what
being "the Empress" means to me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The signature racewear of an Umamusume serves
as a representation of their resolve and a symbol
of their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I strive to follow in the footsteps of my mother,
so I move ever forward in pursuit of my ideals.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
...Well, good for you. But what does that have to
do with—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Would someone who wishes to leave the
academy—someone who's abandoned the
turf—push themselves forward the way you do?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You can't fool me. Whenever you run, I sense
nothing but a fierce desire to win.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Ngh! So what? I—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You still claim that you have nothing to strive
for? Then run with me. Right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The Empress will show you what you claim to lack.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them take off. The younger student
runs with all her might, but Air Groove catches up
in an instant, quickly overtaking her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of Air Groove's beautiful form
overwhelms the younger student, sparking
something within her.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...
choice_data_list:
She's actually quite softhearted, don't you
think?

She's actually quite softhearted, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...
choice_data_list:
She's actually quite softhearted, don't you
think?

She's actually quite softhearted, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Yeah, she is... but also cruel.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
She's planted seeds of motivation even in
someone like me... Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Have you ever wondered why Umamusume are so
fast?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Why our legs are so remarkably resilient?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It is so that we can run on our chosen paths,
wherever they may lead. At least, that's what I
believe.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: I... think I get it...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you have hope, then never stop. Your legs will
carry you ever onward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do not fear the path ahead. It may be
treacherous. You may stumble and fall.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But there will always be someone there to pick
you back up and support you the rest of the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove glances over at me with a hint of a
smile on her lips.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
She sure is. I still think it'd be a lot easier to just
give up.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If that is truly what you wish for, then I won't stop
you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the time to stop for someone who has
already dropped out of their race. I have my own
dreams to pursue.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, if you still have conviction and are
determined to keep moving forward... I shall be a
beacon for you.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Don't you ever feel unsure of yourself? Or lose sight of your goals?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'd be lying if I said I don't. I have my fair share of
inadequacies and shortcomings.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: However, I will never lose sight of my aspirations.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: After all, I have a mirror right beside me.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: A mirror?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Always by my side, reflecting my every
act and making sure that I'm still on the right
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove glances over at me with a hint of a
smile on her lips.
